targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  owner_login AS "Username",
  CASE WHEN POSITION(',' IN COALESCE(employee_name, '')) > 0 THEN TRIM(SPLIT_PART(employee_name, ',', 2)) ELSE TRIM(SPLIT_PART(employee_name || ' ', ' ', 1)) END AS "First Name",
  CASE WHEN POSITION(',' IN COALESCE(employee_name, '')) > 0 THEN TRIM(SPLIT_PART(employee_name, ',', 1)) ELSE TRIM(COALESCE(SUBSTRING(employee_name FROM POSITION(' ' IN employee_name) + 1), employee_name)) END AS "Last Name",
  employee_name AS "Full Name",
  UPPER(SUBSTRING(COALESCE(owner_login, '') FROM 1 FOR 4)) AS "Initials",
  department AS "Department",
  CASE
    WHEN employment_type IN ('Full-time', 'Contract') THEN 'RW'
    WHEN employment_type IN ('Part-time', 'Freelancer', 'Subcontractor') THEN 'Sub'
    WHEN employment_type IN ('Temporary', 'Loan') THEN 'Temp'
    ELSE COALESCE(employment_type, '')
  END AS "Status"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (employee_name)
    owner_login,
    employee_name,
    department,
    employment_type
  FROM work_logs
  WHERE employee_name IS NOT NULL AND employee_name != ''
    AND employment_type IS NOT NULL
    AND work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
    AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
    AND department IN (${service:sqlstring})
    AND activity_type IN (${activity:sqlstring})
    AND (
      ('RW' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Full-time', 'Contract'))
      OR ('Sub' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Part-time', 'Freelancer', 'Subcontractor'))
      OR ('Temp' IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}) AND employment_type IN ('Temporary', 'Loan'))
    )
  ORDER BY employee_name, work_date DESC
) emp
ORDER BY "Last Name", "First Name"

list.label: Department
list.name: service
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT department FROM work_logs WHERE department IS NOT NULL ORDER BY department

list.label: Activity
list.name: activity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT activity_type FROM work_logs WHERE activity_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY activity_type
